creator: kiwi@oav.net
text:
Hello,

I have the following Makefile and have some behaviour that doesn't suit the porter's handbook:

PORTNAME=truc-devel
PORTVERSION=1.1

USE_GITHUB=     yes
GH_TAGNAME=    deadbeef
GH_ACCOUNT=    truc
GH_PROJECT=    truc

When doing make makesum or make fetch => works.

Now when I use GH_TUPLE :

PORTNAME=truc-devel
PORTVERSION=1.1

USE_GITHUB=     yes
GH_TUPLE=       truc:truc:deadbeef:main

The make makesum or make fetch doesn't honor the GH_ACCOUNT given in GH_TUPLE and use ${PORTNAME} instead.

Also when adding multiple packages with :
GH_ACCOUNT=    truc:main,WtF:secondary
GH_PROJECT=    truc:main wtf:secondary
GH_TAGNAME=    deadbeef:main 624eaf4:secondary

I get same behavior than GH_TUPLE. So the local GH_ACCOUNT are not used.

Regards,
Xavier
